calendar.matters: PRO HAC VICE RENEWAL FEE STATUS FOR ATTORNEY JOSHUA KUSHNER

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar May-12-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Cristal Opone's unopposed Motion to Admit Pro Hac Vice Counsel Joshua Kushner is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, counsel Joshua Kushner may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Party in this action.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats the above text verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion To Quash Subpoenas Duces Tecum And For Protective Order
Off Calendar Mar-12-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Paolo Simon, Esq. for Plaintiff;
Andriana Mercurio, Esq. for Defendants.

Hearing re: Plaintiff Cristal Opone's Motion To Quash Subpoenas Duces Tecum And For Protective Order.

The matter is contested. Argument is held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court grants the motion on its conditions set forth at today's hearing.

The Court will review the proposed order submitted by Mr. Simon.

Plaintiff is to prepare and submit a protective order for review by Defendants and then submit it to the Court for approval.

Judge: John M. True III. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (302/JMT)

To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff Cristal Opone To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One )
Off Calendar Feb-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - DEFENDANTs METWEST TERRA HOSPITALITY, INC., SF HOTEL A LLC, and ECHO HEFFERNAN's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff Cristal Opone To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One):

The Court GRANTS Defendants' Motion to Compel discovery related to the investigative report referred to in Plaintiff's demand letter on the ground that any attorney-client privilege or work product objection has been waived by the extensive reference to it, including to the investigator's queries of and interactions with Defendants' staff, observations of the site and findings based thereon. Defendant to prepare a proposed order for the Court's review.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (302/JMT)

Motion To Quash Subpoenas Duces Tecum And For Protective Order
Off Calendar Feb-26-2026 Continued To Mar-12-26 At 01:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court having received timely contest of the tentative ruling continues the matter as follows:

1 - PLAINTIFF CRISTAL OPONE's Motion To Quash Subpoenas Duces Tecum And For Protective Order
is continued to be heard on March 12, 2026 at 1:00 p.m before Judge True in department 302 for oral arguments.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (302/JMT)
